title.en: Java Serialization Performance Study across JDK, Jackson JSON, Jackson Smile, Protobuf, Kryo, and Hessian2
title.zh: Java 序列化性能调研：JDK、Jackson JSON、Jackson Smile、Protobuf、Kryo、Hessian2

summary.en: A benchmark-backed comparison of JDK native serialization, Jackson JSON, Jackson Smile, Protobuf, Kryo, and Hessian2 across size, latency, ecosystem fit, cross-language support, schema evolution, and security boundaries.
summary.zh: 基于 java-serialization-compare 项目的测试结果，对 JDK 原生序列化、Jackson JSON、Jackson Smile、Protobuf、Kryo 和 Hessian2 的体积、性能、生态、跨语言能力、schema 演进和安全边界进行横向对比。

readingDirection.en: Read this when evaluating serialization choices for Java RPC, message queues, caches, object persistence, or middleware data exchange.
readingDirection.zh: 适合在评估 Java 服务 RPC、消息队列、缓存、对象持久化或中间件数据交换的序列化方案时阅读。
